title: extra ores and gear
description: a minecraft mod that adds a new set of gear to the game that is more rare than netherite
body:
this mod adds a new set of gear called varanium . it is more expensive than netherite .
its so rare that finding is is harder than finding netherite . this ore can also be brought from a novice librarian with about 30 emeralds and 1 netherite ingot . raw varanium can be crafted with 4 varanium and 4 netherite and 1 dimond in the middle . simmilar to how netherinte ingot is crafted.then it needs to be smelted into varanium ingot . netherite tools and gear can be turned into varanium ones via a smithing table . it would require 1 varanium ingot and 1 dimon to convert netherite tools and gears .
